sources.description: The project's original 100 beginner entries, retained in the foundation tier with their IDs and translations.
Lemmatized Spanish frequency data and English Wiktionary glosses assembled by Jeff Doozan.

notes: This is a broad testing vocabulary, not an official CEFR placement instrument.
Tier assignment is primarily frequency-based after preserving the original beginner entries.
English glosses were shortened and selected for multiple-choice testing; they do not represent every sense.
The application uses this dataset for onboarding, daily sessions, reviews, and extra practice.
